main.name: Hoang Trung Phong
main.desc1: I am a 2D artist specializing in anime-style illustration and character design, focusing on harmonious colors and expressive characters.
main.desc2: I have Japanese proficiency at JLPT N3 and am continuing to improve my communication skills. I aim to develop my abilities in a professional studio environment and contribute to high-quality anime illustration projects.

about.title: ABOUT ME
about.name: Hoang Trung Phong
about.p1: I am a <1>2D Artist</1> pursuing <1>anime-style</1> illustration. I studied Information Technology at Ho Chi Minh City University of Technology <1>(HUTECH)</1>, Vietnam–Japan Institute of Technology. My <1>IT background</1> provides me with logical thinking, discipline, and the ability to work efficiently within digital workflows.
about.p2: I focus on building artworks with clear linework, well-structured composition, and a strong sense of refinement in every detail.
about.p3: I aim to create works that are not only technically accurate but also carry depth in emotion and aesthetics.
about.p4: Currently, I hold a <1>JLPT N3</1> level in Japanese and aspire to work in a professional Japanese environment to further develop my skills and contribute long-term value to the team.

skills.title: SKILLS
skills.subtitle: A showcase of my technical and creative abilities

drawing.title: Drawing / Illustration
drawing.description: I enjoy drawing anime characters and backgrounds, focusing on color harmony and mood. This hobby strengthens my creativity and visual sense, which supports my design and front-end work.

uiux.title: UI/UX Design
uiux.description: With both design sense and coding skills, I can transform UI/UX ideas into interactive, responsive web interfaces. I focus on building designs that are visually appealing, accessible, and consistent across devices.

graphic.title: Graphic Design
graphic.description: I have experience designing posters and visual content for clubs and events. I focus on creating clean, aesthetic designs that clearly convey messages and enhance visual appeal.

game.title: Game Art / Unity
game.description: Experience creating 2D game art including characters, bullet visuals, and visual effects. Familiar with implementing assets and basic gameplay logic in Unity to support clear and readable gameplay.

web.title: Web Developer
web.description: I'm capable of developing complete web applications on both Front-end and Back-end. My main technologies include ReactJS, Node.js, and Java, which allow me to build efficient and scalable systems with clean and user-friendly interfaces.

others.title: Others
others.description: Good at teamwork, communication, and time management. Skilled in problem-solving and adapting to new technologies. Japanese level: JLPT N3.

activities.title: ACTIVITIES
activities.description: A selection of my extracurricular activities and contributions

isshou.title: Isshou Japanese Language Club – VJIT
description: Designed educational posts introducing Japanese vocabulary for club members.
Created posters and visual materials for club activities using Photoshop.

ardenlolo.title: Art Game – Ardenlolo (Facebook)
description: Participated in art games organized by Ardenlolo.
Colored original anime illustrations focusing on lighting, color harmony, and mood.

artstreet.title: Art Contest – Web Art Street
description: Participated in seasonal art contests on Art Street.
Created original illustrations based on contest themes.

wallnewspaper.title: Wall Newspaper Project – VJIT
description: Designed a wall newspaper themed around the Japanese Hiragana alphabet.
Responsible for illustration and overall layout composition.

projects.title: PROJECTS
projects.subtitle: Explore my works and creative endeavors

game.desc: A 2D bullet hell game inspired by Touhou Project and Just Shapes & Beats, focusing on precise movement, bullet dodging, and skill-based gameplay.

weatherchill.desc: WeatherChill is a relaxing web app that blends music, visuals, and motion effects to create a chill and immersive experience.

nihongo.desc: An interactive web app for learning Japanese, featuring vocabulary practice, grammar lessons, quizzes, and a clean interface.

shopanime.desc: An online anime store offering figures, apparel, and collectibles with a fun shopping experience.

portfolio.desc: Showcasing my projects and creative work, including web development and design.

contact.subtitle: Let’s connect and collaborate
